name: Eggplant Kottu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Split chickpeas or mong dahl
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the chickpeas or moong dahl in 1 1/2 cups water with a pinch of salt and 1/8 teaspoon turmeric until tender.
2. Mash the chickpeas well.
3. Slice the eggplants lengthwise and boil them in a large saucepan filled with 2 cups water, a pinch of salt, and 1/8 teaspoon turmeric until tender.
4. Add the mashed chickpeas to the boiled eggplants.
5. Grind the coconut, cumin seed, green chilies (if using), and red chilies together in a food processor.
6. Heat 1 tablespoon vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the mustard seeds and bay leaves. When the mustard seeds stop spluttering, add the ground mixture to the eggplants.
7. Stir in the lemon juice and salt to taste. Sprinkle with chopped coriander leaves before serving.
